name: codex-image-workbench
description: Local Amazon image planning, generation queue, versioning, and quality workbench.

interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to the local image workbench for new-product planning and existing-Listing optimization, including evidence Gates, one-variable challenges, generation queues, asset versions, technical checks, manual QC, publication records, observations, rollback decisions, and Registry candidate governance.
defaultPrompt: Show the current image workbench projects and queue.
Open the new-product launch workspace and report its blockers.
Open the existing-Listing optimization workspace and report its blockers.
Claim the next image generation job.
